title: Compareable Music
wikitext:
[]: Compareable Music             Quote Post by Millions Livio » Mon Oct 30, 2006 6:34 pm I am a big classical music fan, don't listen to much else music to tell the truth. However there's kind of a mid point with EVA. What I like to personally call Neo-Classical music. Kind of a depressant genre almost, that is what in my eyes the original music from End of Evangelion soundtrack captures. Does anyone know of any other soundtracks or music that is somewhat cannon to the quality and "mood" of the End of Evangelion soundtrack? I've downloaded a lot of other anime soundtracks along with other soundtracks and they just don't really sound like what I'm looking for. Anyone have any ideas?

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Mon Oct 30, 2006 8:09 pm You familiar with Erik Satie? In 1888 he wrote a collection of GymnopÃ©dies, I think it's the 1st one, has been used in anime before. The mood reminds me a lot of the slowed down version of Jesu, Joy of Man's Desiring from EoE. Really slow. Edit: I think I remember the anime it was in, Neo Tokyo, during the Labyrinth section. Although I can't seem to find a soundtrack listing online

[]:             Quote Post by Quiddity » Mon Oct 30, 2006 8:22 pm Try the Ideon: Be Invoked soundtrack. (it may still be here, where I got it: http://www.shin-getter.net/forums/index.php?topic=288.0). Very similar movie to End of Eva, and at times, similar soundtrack too. Infact "Escape from the Beginning" and "False Regeneration" from End of Eva's OST just scream out "Ideon homage" to me, sounding very similar to some of the themes on the Ideon Be Invoked soundtrack.

Article: Compareable Music
[]: Compareable Music             Quote Post by Millions Livio » Mon Oct 30, 2006 6:34 pm I am a big classical music fan, don't listen to much else music to tell the truth. However there's kind of a mid point with EVA. What I like to personally call Neo-Classical music. Kind of a depressant genre almost, that is what in my eyes the original music from End of Evangelion soundtrack captures. Does anyone know of any other soundtracks or music that is somewhat cannon to the quality and "mood" of the End of Evangelion soundtrack? I've downloaded a lot of other anime soundtracks along with other soundtracks and they just don't really sound like what I'm looking for. Anyone have any ideas?

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Mon Oct 30, 2006 8:09 pm You familiar with Erik Satie? In 1888 he wrote a collection of GymnopÃ©dies, I think it's the 1st one, has been used in anime before. The mood reminds me a lot of the slowed down version of Jesu, Joy of Man's Desiring from EoE. Really slow. Edit: I think I remember the anime it was in, Neo Tokyo, during the Labyrinth section. Although I can't seem to find a soundtrack listing online

[]:             Quote Post by Quiddity » Mon Oct 30, 2006 8:22 pm Try the Ideon: Be Invoked soundtrack. (it may still be here, where I got it: http://www.shin-getter.net/forums/index.php?topic=288.0). Very similar movie to End of Eva, and at times, similar soundtrack too. Infact "Escape from the Beginning" and "False Regeneration" from End of Eva's OST just scream out "Ideon homage" to me, sounding very similar to some of the themes on the Ideon Be Invoked soundtrack.
